calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Jun-13-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox, for petitioner Gene Marchi.

Ms. Fox reported that the bond is on the administrator's desk for signature, and should be filed by tomorrow. She requested a very brief continuance to get the bond signed and on file. The status hearing was continued to June 13, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
